phrases.intent_en: Ask where Jim Morrison's grave is
phrases.text_local: Où est la tombe de Jim Morrison ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah TOHM duh zheem moh-ree-SOHN
phrases.cultural_note: Jim Morrison's grave is in Division 6. It's the most visited tomb and usually has flowers, notes, and sometimes fans playing music. Guards patrol to prevent vandalism.

responses.english: Jim Morrison's grave is in division 6, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: lah tohm duh zheem moh-ree-SOHN eh dahn lah dee-vee-ZYOHN sees, swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: La tombe de Jim Morrison est dans la division six, suivez les panneaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a map of famous graves
phrases.text_local: Avez-vous un plan avec les tombes célèbres ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-VAY voo uhn PLAHN ah-VEK lay TOHM say-LEHBR
phrases.cultural_note: Free maps are available at the main entrances (Boulevard de Ménilmontant and Rue du Repos). The cemetery is huge — 44 hectares — so a map is essential.

responses.english: Maps are free at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: lay plahn sohn grah-TWEET ah lan-TRAY pran-see-PAL
responses.french: Les plans sont gratuits à l'entrée principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Oscar Wilde's tomb is
phrases.text_local: Pour aller à la tombe d'Oscar Wilde ?
phrases.pronunciation: poor ah-LAY ah lah TOHM dos-KAR WYLD
phrases.cultural_note: Oscar Wilde's tomb (Division 89) features a striking Art Deco angel by Jacob Epstein. A glass barrier now protects it from the lipstick kisses that once covered it.

responses.english: Oscar Wilde is in division 89, toward the north of the cemetery.
responses.phonetic: os-KAR wahyld eh dahn lah dee-vee-ZYOHN kah-trah-van-NUHF, vehr luh nor doo seem-TYEHR
responses.french: Oscar Wilde est dans la division 89, vers le nord du cimetière.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Edith Piaf is buried
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la tombe d'Édith Piaf ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah TOHM day-DEET pee-AHF
phrases.cultural_note: Piaf's grave (Division 97) is near the eastern edge. It's always covered with fresh flowers. Chopin's tomb (Division 11) is also a must-see, adorned with a beautiful muse sculpture.

responses.english: Edith Piaf is in division 97, near the Rue des Rondeaux entrance.
responses.phonetic: ay-DEET pyaf eh dahn lah dee-vee-ZYOHN kah-trah-van-dee-SET, preh duh lan-TRAY duh lah roo day rohn-DOH
responses.french: Edith Piaf est dans la division 97, près de l'entrée de la Rue des Rondeaux.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the cemetery's opening hours
phrases.text_local: Le cimetière est ouvert jusqu'à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh seem-TYEHR eh oo-VEHR zhoos-KAH kel UHR
phrases.cultural_note: Open daily from 8 AM (9 AM on weekends). Closes between 5:30 PM and 6 PM depending on season. Entry is free. The atmosphere is peaceful and park-like — not at all gloomy.

responses.english: The cemetery opens at eight and closes at six.
responses.phonetic: luh seem-TYEHR oov-ruh ah weet uhr ay fehrm ah dee-zweet uhr
responses.french: Le cimetière ouvre à huit heures et ferme à dix-huit heures.
